Class used for integration testing for the JIRA Watcher Field Plugin.

isIssueEditable(Issue) - Method in class com.burningcode.jira.issue.customfields.impl.WatcherFieldType
Checks to see if the issue can be edited.
isJiraAdmin(User) - Method in class com.burningcode.jira.issue.customfields.impl.WatcherFieldType
Checks if a user is a JIRA administrator.
isUserPermitted(Issue) - Method in class com.burningcode.jira.issue.customfields.impl.WatcherFieldType
Checks if a user the authenticated user has the "Manage Watcher List" permission.
isUserPermitted(Issue) - Method in class com.burningcode.jira.rest.WatcherResource
Checks if a user the authenticated user has the "View Voters and Watchers" permission.
